g.text: 更保守，严格舒适成功率仍未达80%

text.style: fill: #222222; font: 9.2px 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: 运营鲁棒主推，不等于严格舒适主推

text.style: fill: #222222; font: 9.2px 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: 高覆盖候选，未达到严格鲁棒阈值

text.style: fill: #222222; font: 9.2px 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: start

fill: #ffffff; font: 8.6px 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: 覆盖上界，不作为现实执行方案

text.style: fill: #222222; font: 700 18px 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: 32景点是覆盖上界，24景点才是运营鲁棒主推

text.style: fill: #666666; font: 10.5px 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: 漏斗按现实可执行性收束：覆盖越高不代表越稳健，严格舒适口径需另行展示。
